series_metadata.series_description: Manual Reemployment Services assessment, Customer Survey, Individual Reemployment Plan, Acknowledgement Forms, Attendance Sheet, Job Contacts, Resumes, and weekly list of customers (claimants) eligible for reemployment services. Reemployment and Eligibility Assessment (REA) is program that provides early intervention reemployment assistance.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 1 year and 4 years in the Record Center then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
